text:
urn entered Capricorn, an old man with saintly
character, (Jupiter is in the 2nd to Saturn conjunct Ketu plus Saturn and Mars
exchanging places), came to him and when Saints and Sadhus came for alms,
he abused them and sent them away. They in their tum showered curses on
him.
As for the loss of brothers the explanation is that Mars having exchange
of places with Saturn will get the conjunction of Ketu. So the indicator of
brothers became powerless under Ketu's influence.
The Sun is influenced by Saturn as he is in the sign owned by the latter.
Venus denoting wife has exchange of places with Jupiter in Taurus and Jupiter
has just come out of the clutches of Ketu placed in Aries. Jupiter denotes
children. Mars denotes brothers. Therefore the father ofthe native suffered

276 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
from the curse of the Sadhus in the previous birth and experienced loss of
brothers and sons in this life.
The native will be a good soul with faith and devotion to God and fully
